results.alt: Quiet Luxury, Thoughtfully Made Founded in 2022, Velmora bridges the gap between costume jewelry and fine jewelry. We believe in accessible luxury — pieces that look and feel expensive without the prohibitive price tag.

Where Timeless Craft Meets Modern Elegance Born from a belief that luxury should be accessible, Velmora creates demi-fine jewelry that bridges the gap between costume and fine. Each piece is thoughtfully designed, meticulously crafted with 18K gold plating, and made to be worn every day — from morning coffee to evening cocktails.
